description: A Class A artifact declaring a canonicalization scheme other than RFC8785-JCS MUST receive INVALID status under WiseOrder v0.1.0.

input.claim: this artifact matches its declared origin digest

why: Artifact canonicalization scheme is not RFC8785-JCS. WiseOrder Protocol v0.1.0 §4 (CS1, CS3) registers only RFC8785-JCS for Class A integrity operations. Future versions MAY register additional canonicalization schemes; v0.1.0 remains JCS-only.
